package sample

import (
	"database/sql"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"gorm.io/gorm/clause"
)

type User struct {
	ID int
}

type Role struct {
	ID int
}

func OpenSQL(c *gin.Context) {
	db, _ := sql.Open("sqlite3", "file:test.db")
	_ = db
	_ = c
}

func OpenGorm(c *gin.Context) {
	gormDB, _ := gorm.Open(nil, nil)
	_ = gormDB
	_ = c
}

func PingDatabase(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) {
	_ = db.Ping()
	_ = c
}

func ReconfigurePool(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) {
	db.SetMaxOpenConns(100)
	_ = c
}

func PrepareSame(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) {
	first, _ := db.PrepareContext(nil, "SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = ?")
	second, _ := db.PrepareContext(nil, "SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = ?")
	_ = first
	_ = second
	_ = c
}

func BuildStatements(db *sql.DB, ids []int) {
	for _, id := range ids {
		stmt, _ := db.PrepareContext(nil, "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?")
		_ = stmt
		_ = id
	}
}

func TransactionPerItem(db *sql.DB, ids []int) {
	for _, id := range ids {
		tx, _ := db.Begin()
		_ = tx
		_ = id
	}
}

func CreateUsers(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB, users []User) {
	for _, user := range users {
		db.Debug().Create(&user)
	}
	_ = c
}

func ListUsers(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB, page int) {
	var users []User
	_ = db.Preload(clause.Associations).Offset(page * 20).Find(&users)
	_ = c
}

func SessionPerItem(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) {
	var user User
	for _, id := range ids {
		_ = db.Session(&gorm.Session{}).Where("id = ?", id).First(&user)
	}
}

func PreloadPerItem(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) {
	var users []User
	for _, id := range ids {
		_ = db.Preload(clause.Associations).Where("id = ?", id).Find(&users)
	}
}

func RawScanPerItem(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) {
	var user User
	for _, id := range ids {
		_ = db.Raw("SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = ?", id).Scan(&user)
	}
}

func AssociationPerItem(db *gorm.DB, users []User) {
	var roles []Role
	for _, user := range users {
		_ = db.Model(&user).Association("Roles").Find(&roles)
	}
}

func FirstOrCreatePerItem(db *gorm.DB, users []User) {
	for _, user := range users {
		_ = db.Where("id = ?", user.ID).FirstOrCreate(&user)
	}
}

func SavePerItem(db *gorm.DB, users []User) {
	for _, user := range users {
		_ = db.Save(&user)
	}
}

func UpdatePerItem(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) {
	for _, id := range ids {
		_ = db.Model(&User{}).Where("id = ?", id).Update("active", true)
	}
}

func DeletePerItem(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) {
	for _, id := range ids {
		_ = db.Where("id = ?", id).Delete(&User{})
	}
}

func CountAndFindUsers(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB, status string) {
	var total int64
	var users []User
	_ = db.Model(&User{}).Where("status = ?", status).Count(&total)
	_ = db.Model(&User{}).Where("status = ?", status).Find(&users)
	_ = c
}

func BulkActivate(db *sql.DB, ids []int) {
	for _, id := range ids {
		_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE users SET active = 1 WHERE id = ?", id)
	}
}

func LookupUsers(db *sql.DB, ids []int) {
	for _, id := range ids {
		_ = db.QueryRow("SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = ?", id)
	}
}

func CountUsers(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) {
	var total int64
	for _, id := range ids {
		_ = db.Model(&User{}).Where("id = ?", id).Count(&total)
	}
}
